ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school" TEXT /* School attended by the student */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the student */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "famsize" TEXT /* Family size */,
  "Pstatus" TEXT /* Parental status */,
  "Medu" INTEGER /* Mother's education */,
  "Fedu" INTEGER /* Father's education */,
  "Mjob" TEXT /* Mother's job */,
  "Fjob" TEXT /* Father's job */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for attending school */,
  "nursery" TEXT /* Nursery attendance */,
  "internet" TEXT /* Internet availability */,
  "guardian" TEXT /* Guardian */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language spoken by the student */,
  "disability" INTEGER /* Whether the student has a disability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "G1" INTEGER /* Grade in the first period */,
  "G2" INTEGER /* Grade in the second period */,
  "G3" INTEGER /* Grade in the third period */,
  "GPA" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "final_grade" TEXT /* Final grade of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_habits" (
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study habit record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "traveltime" INTEGER /* Travel time to school */,
  "studytime" INTEGER /* Study time per day */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of times the student has failed */,
  "study_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of studying */,
  "study_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the student studies */,
  "self_study_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours the student spends on self-study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_habits_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "extracurricular_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each extracurricular activity record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "schoolsup" TEXT /* School support */,
  "famsup" TEXT /* Family support */,
  "paid" TEXT /* Paid classes outside of school */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Extracurricular activities */,
  "higher" TEXT /* Wants to go to higher education */,
  "romantic" TEXT /* Has romantic relationship */,
  "club_memberships" TEXT /* Clubs the student is a member of */,
  "volunteer_work" INTEGER /* Whether the student does volunteer work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_extracurricular_activities_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_background" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family background record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "famrel" INTEGER /* Family relationships */,
  "freetime" INTEGER /* Free time */,
  "goout" INTEGER /* Going out with friends */,
  "Dalc" INTEGER /* Workday alcohol consumption */,
  "Walc" INTEGER /* Weekend alcohol consumption */,
  "family_income" REAL /* Family income */,
  "parental_involvement" TEXT /* Level of parental involvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_background_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health status */,
  "mental_health" TEXT /* Mental health status */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Whether the student has a disability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "absences" (
  "absence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each absence record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of absences */,
  "reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for absence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("absence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_absences_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcohol_consumption" (
  "alc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alcohol consumption record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "alc_use" REAL /* Alcohol consumption */,
  "high_use" INTEGER /* High alcohol consumption */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of drinking */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context of drinking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alcohol_consumption_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the system */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend in student performance */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_performance_trends_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_survey" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "q1" TEXT /* Response to question 1 */,
  "q2" TEXT /* Response to question 2 */,
  "q3" TEXT /* Response to question 3 */,
  "q4" TEXT /* Response to question 4 */,
  "q5" TEXT /* Response to question 5 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_survey_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_completion" (
  "completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each completion record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_completion_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
